summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for DressApp Chrome Extension Size Chart Analyzer endpoint (POST /api/v1/sizes/analyze-chart) and related functionality. All 9 tests passed successfully (100% success rate).
passed_tests: Backend started cleanly with no ImportError or TypeError (confirmed HFImageService InferenceClient kwarg fix and provider_activity import fix are working)
POST /api/v1/sizes/analyze-chart returns 401 without Authorization bearer token
POST /api/v1/sizes/analyze-chart with valid auth token and chart_html returns 200 with correct AnalyzeChartOut schema (recommended_size, confidence, has_measurements, source, elapsed_ms, etc.)
POST /api/v1/sizes/analyze-chart with chart_screenshot_b64 only returns 200 with source='none' (expected in dev env where Gemma/Qwen are unreachable - endpoint never 5xxs)
POST /api/v1/sizes/analyze-chart with empty body returns 422 with detail: 'Provide chart_html, chart_text, or chart_screenshot_b64.'
POST /api/v1/sizes/analyze-chart with empty body_measurements returns 200 with has_measurements=false (no 422 - correct behavior)
POST /api/v1/sizes/analyze-chart with measurements and chart ranges produces heuristic fallback recommendation (source='heuristic', recommended_size='S', confidence=0.4, matched_columns=['chest'])
GET /api/v1/users/me works with valid token and correctly returns body_measurements field
